chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.D-11 of 2023 Crl. Revision Application No.D-12 of 2023 Crl. Revision Application No.D-13 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 27-02-2024 None present for applicants in Crl. R.As No.D-11 & 12 of 2023. Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for applicant in Crl.R.A.No.D-13 of 2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Crl. Revision Applications No.11 & 12 of 2023. Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for applicants in both matters is called absent; same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 14.02.2024. No intimation is received so far. Accordingly, both Crl. Revision Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Crl. Revision Application No.13 of 2023. Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Revision Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
